prompt: Generate a highly detailed CAD model rendering of a vintage camera, specifically inspired by the design, textures, and proportions of the camera in the reference image, presented as a clean product shot.
prompt_refined: Generate a highly detailed CAD model rendering of a vintage camera, specifically referencing the design, textures, and proportions of the camera depicted in image 1. The rendered camera should feature a two-tone body with a smooth, reflective silver finish on the top and bottom sections, contrasting with a black, finely pebbled leatherette texture on the central grip area, consistent with image 1. Include a prominent central lens with visible numerical and textual markings, such as "COLOR GOTAR" and "RECTAMAT". The front face should also incorporate a rectangular viewfinder/flash array near the top-center, and a distinct red emblem with a 'K' symbol on the front-right side, mirroring the details found in image 1. Present this as a clean, professionally lit product shot, with the camera positioned centrally on a plain white background.
objects: two-tone camera body (silver top and bottom sections, black central grip area)
smooth, reflective silver finish on top and bottom sections
black, finely pebbled leatherette texture on central grip area
visible numerical and textual markings on lens (e.g., "COLOR GOTAR", "RECTAMAT")
rectangular viewfinder/flash array near the top-center
distinct red emblem with a 'K' symbol on the front-right side
